name: credence-pi governance
description: Bayesian in-loop governance for the pi/OpenClaw agent — intercepts tool calls and halts/asks on low expected-value spend; logs outcomes and per-turn cost for the dollars-saved surface.

daemonUrl.description: Base URL of the credence-pi Julia daemon (POST /sensor, GET /signals).

hookTimeoutMs.description: Max time to await the daemon's decision before failing open (proceeding without governance).

pricing.description: Optional per-model USD price overrides in $/million tokens: { "<model-id>": { "input": <num>, "output": <num>, "cacheRead": <num>, "cacheWrite": <num> } }. Merged over the built-in table.
